subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-14 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: These souls journeyed unto America and delivered goodly addresses, being possessed of dual arts. They were well-versed in the English tongue. Nevertheless, no fruit was borne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینها به امریکا رفتند و نطق خوب می کردند و دو فنون هم بودند.  انگلیزی را خوب می دانستند.  معذلک هیچ کاری
subcodes.subjects: @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
